title: Confirm Registration
subtitle: If this is you, please hit the Confirm button. Then you will receive an email, and after clicking the link in that email, you are all good to go!

error.invalidDataMessage: Missing confirmation data. Please close and try registering again.
error.registrationFailedMessage: Unable to complete registration. Please try again.
error.confirmationFailedMessage: Unable to confirm registration. Please try again.
